examples.title: Vector Addition
examples.description: A pseudocode implementation of vector addition
examples.code:
FUNCTION addVectors(Vector A, Vector B)
  RESULT = Vector(A.x + B.x, A.y + B.y)
  RETURN RESULT
END FUNCTION
examples.explanation: This pseudocode function adds two vectors by adding their corresponding components

examples.title: Vector Dot Product
examples.description: A Python implementation of the vector dot product
examples.code:
def dotProduct(A, B):
  return A.x * B.x + A.y * B.y
examples.explanation: This Python function calculates the dot product of two vectors by multiplying their corresponding components and summing the results
